title: Responsive web experience
summary: Design and implementation of a responsive web surface for presenting the platform and its music content.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on executable digital behaviour implemented in a website, application, interface or connected software system.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Brand and experience-system responsibility: Design and implementation of a responsive web surface for presenting the platform and its music content.
